source.body_text_sample:

JOB BOARD

Please submit resume and cover letter describing why you would be a good fit for the position appying for to:  admin@hillviewimaging.ca 

-
Diagnostic Medical Sonographer

Job description




POSITIONS: Casual/Part - Time

HOURS OF WORK: Evenings and/or Saturdays

DESCRIPTION: Looking to pick up some extra hours?  We are willing to work around any other job schedule.  Under the direction of the Clinic Manager, will be responsible for ultrasound scanning of patients in this state of the art imaging centre. Will be accountable for contributing to the delivery of the highest quality care, in a patient centered environment. Will have the opportunity to continue learning and advancing your skills in a supportive environment. As part of an urgent imaging center you will have the opportunity to image complex and urgent pathology on an ongoing basis.  




PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES AND ABILITIES: (representative but not all inclusive)

Must be able to work efficiently and independently
Prepare and explain ultrasound procedures to patients while performing the study
Perform abdominal, obstetrical/gynecology, pelvic, breast, transvaginal, transrectal, chest, face, neck, brain, small parts, extremity, Doppler, pediatric, or other studies as requested by the referring physicians and as instructed by the physician in charge
Operate compl
